headline: Moderna Pops As Vinay Prasad, The FDA's Controversial Vaccine Head, Will Depart In April
summary: Moderna stock jumped late Friday on reports the FDA's top vaccine official, Vinay Prasad, will step down amid mounting industry concerns.

headline: PacBio, CONMED, Moderna, QuidelOrtho, and Tandem Diabetes Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the February jobs report revealed an unexpected contraction in employment, with the healthcare industry showing significant job losses.

headline: FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions
summary: Vinay Prasad is leaving his post as director of the Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research.

headline: These 3 Stocks Just Bounced From Lows — What Wall Street Thinks Comes Next
summary: Wall Street’s read on three of 2026’s most volatile names—Moderna (NASDAQ: MRNA), Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), and Trade Desk (NASDAQ: TTD)—tells three very different stories. All three have bounced off recent lows, but analyst consensus reveals sharply divergent conviction levels behind each recovery. headline: FDA reversals leave investors worrying about the fates of other experimental drugs
